1.text: Increased density consistent with scarring in the apical regions of both lungs

2.text: Increased density causing structural distortion and volume loss in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Two calcified parenchymal nodules in the superior segment of the left lower lobe, largest measuring 10 mm

4.text: Paracicatricial bronchiectatic changes in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Branching opacities in a small area in the peripheral subpleural region of the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
